title: ManePear's Scythe
description: Replaces the mace into the scythe from ManePear's videos.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4224f6e3e5197546c716b32be4e121d597f15020.png)


This texture pack adds ManePear’s custom scythe from his latest videos! It replaces the mace with his iconic scythe model and texture, perfect for roleplaying, PvP, or just looking cool while farming mobs.
If you’re a fan of ManePear or just want a clean and unique-looking weapon, give this pack a try! Works in vanilla Minecraft!

Huge shoutout to my friend NexPear for helping with the texture — couldn’t have done it without him!

**Subscribe to my YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/@OasisSucksAtMc?sub_confirmation=1
